bio.about: I'm a dedicated and energetic professional with a BSc in Psychology and over 10 years of experience as a PSW, aesthetician, and RMT. I've worked with diverse populations and developed strong skills in understanding and addressing patients needs. I'm committed to continuous growth and delivering high-quality, patient-centered care while building strong rapport with patients and colleagues.
bio.cases: I enjoy treating clients with muscle tension, chronic pain, stress-related concerns, and pre/postnatal needs. I also work with postural issues and soft tissue restrictions.
bio.specializations: The top three treatments I specialize in are techniques like deep tissue, trigger point therapy, and Swedish massage to support recovery and overall wellness. I focus on addressing the root cause of pain and dysfunction, not just symptoms, so clients experience long-lasting results and improved movement.
bio.proud_of: I'm most proud of how I connect with clients and tailor treatments to their needs. I focus on pain relief, education, and long-term improvement, and it's rewarding to see clients regain mobility and confidence. I'm committed to professionalism and continuous growth to provide the best care possible.
bio.why_choose: Patients should choose me because I deliver personalized, results-focused care. I take time to understand each client's needs, improve function, and support lasting progress. I'm attentive, professional, and genuinely committed to helping clients feel and move better.
